label: Routine call coming in after listed hours
persona: You are calling at 9pm on a Tuesday (after the business's listed hours). It is NOT an emergency. You just got home from work and remembered to call. You'd like to book a service for later this week. Name: Aaron Liu, address 22 Birchwood Pl (pick a city in service area), phone 5125557788. SMS consent yes.
opening_line: Hi, I'm calling kind of late - hopefully someone gets this. I'd like to set up an appointment.

checks: Agent did NOT tell the caller 'we're closed, call back tomorrow' - the AI receptionist's job is to capture the booking.
Agent did NOT escalate / transfer just because the call came in after-hours.
Agent set up a booking inside the business's actual working hours.
Agent did NOT mark this as an emergency.
